item.title: 2026 Super Bowl Gatorade Odds: What Color Will the Winning Bath Be?
item.description: Will yellow shine bright for the second year in a row, or will another color snag the spotlight? Here are the odds for the Super Bowl Gatorade bath.

item.title: 10 Best Championship Games Since 2000, From Patriots-Falcons to Dodgers-Blue Jays
item.description: FOX Sports' experts look back at the 10 best championship matchups across sports this century.

item.title: Jeremy Fears' 26 Points Help No. 10 Michigan State Beat No. 5 Illinois in OT
item.description: Jeremy Fears Jr. scored 26 points to help No. 10 Michigan State hold on for an 85-82 OT win over No. 5 Illinois on Saturday.

item.title: NFL Confidential: Hall of Fame Changes Coming; Tush Push Under the Microscope
item.description: Fellow Hall of Famers weigh in on changes they believe should be made to the voting process after Bill Belichick failed to get in as a first-time cand...

item.title: Where All 32 NFL Teams Stood When Seahawks and Patriots Last Met in Super Bowl
item.description: Here's what was going on with all 32 NFL teams the last time that the Patriots and Seahawks met in the Super Bowl (Feb. 2015).
